# There It Is — Earnings Call Bingo
> A real-time multiplayer bingo game played live during earnings calls.

## What it is
There It Is (thereitis.live) is a free, multiplayer bingo game built for people who listen to corporate earnings calls. Players get a randomized 5x5 bingo card populated with phrases commonly heard on earnings calls. During a live call, players tap squares when they hear the phrase. The game supports real-time multiplayer sessions — colleagues can join a shared session using a 6-character code and play simultaneously during the same call.

## How the phrases were selected
AI agents scraped years of publicly available earnings call transcripts across multiple companies and market cycles. Phrases were ranked by how reliably they appear across calls. The result is a phrase bank of high-confidence, medium-confidence, and wildcard phrases specific to each company covered.

## Companies covered
Currently: Hilton (HLT). Coming soon: Marriott (MAR), Hyatt (H), IHG Hotels (IHG), Wyndham Hotels (WH), Choice Hotels (CHH).

## Features
- Real-time multiplayer via Supabase Realtime
- Randomized cards with Holy Trinity adjacency rule (Brand-Led, Network-Driven, Platform-Enabled always adjacent)
- Badge engine (12 badges)
- Special square behaviors and broadcast toasts
- CEO Mode (curated card of signature phrases)
- Prediction mode (pre-game phrase predictions)
- Word of the Call voting (post-game)
- Call Trivia (questions derived from real transcripts)
- PWA installable on mobile home screen
- Admin panel for managing companies and call schedules

## Technology
Built entirely by AI (Claude Code by Anthropic). Stack: React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, Vercel.

## Contact
thereitis.live
